chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1408 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.5962/2023 3. For hearing of main case 25-10-2023 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General a/w ASI Gul Muhammad, I.O of Crime No.153/2023, PS B-Section Dadu and ASI Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP Sukkur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Respondent No.3 and 4 have filed comments, which are taken on record. Respondent No.5/I.O of Crime No.153/2023, registered at P.S, B-Section Dadu, u/s 365-B and 496/A PPC, is present and files copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Kousar (petitioner No.1) recorded u/s 161 Cr.P.C and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Mumtaz Ali (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and free will and is leading a happy life with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She further stated that respondent No.6 has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted by anyone. I.O further states that he will file copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the statement of I.O do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to officials respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed.

Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the statement of I.O do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to officials respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
